_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

data.name: message_revision_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, slot_id) REFERENCES message_slot_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, parent_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
CHECK (parent_revision_id IS NULL OR parent_revision_id <> id)
CHECK (updated_at >= created_at)
CHECK (finalized_at IS NULL OR finalized_at >= created_at)
CHECK (deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at)

data.name: conversation_branch_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, parent_branch_id) REFERENCES conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, forked_from_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, leaf_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
CHECK (parent_branch_id IS NULL OR parent_branch_id <> id)
CHECK (deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at)

data.name: conversation_state_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, active_branch_id) REFERENCES conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, context_start_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

data.name: message_part_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
CHECK (updated_at >= created_at)

data.name: provider_artifact_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
CHECK (updated_at >= created_at)

data.name: migration_run_rows
constraints: CHECK (completed_at IS NULL OR completed_at >= started_at)

data.name: generation_run_rows
constraints: FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, target_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
CHECK (updated_at >= created_at)
CHECK (terminal_at IS NULL OR terminal_at >= created_at)
CHECK ((state IN ('preparing', 'requesting', 'streaming', 'waiting_tool') AND terminal_at IS NULL) OR (state IN ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') AND terminal_at IS NOT NULL))
CHECK (error_code IS NULL OR (length(error_code) BETWEEN 1 AND 128 AND state IN ('failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted')))

data.name: idx_generation_runs_active_target
data.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_generation_runs_active_target ON generation_run_rows (conversation_id, target_revision_id) WHERE state IN ('preparing', 'requesting', 'streaming', 'waiting_tool')

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "conversation_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "is_pinned" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_pinned" IN (0, 1)), "assistant_id" TEXT NULL, "truncate_index" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -1 CHECK("truncate_index" >= -1), "version_selections_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "summary" TEXT NULL, "last_summarized_message_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK("last_summarized_message_count" >= 0), "chat_suggestions_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]', PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "message_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "role" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("role" IS NOT ''), "content" TEXT NOT NULL, "timestamp" INTEGER NOT NULL, "model_id" TEXT NULL, "provider_id" TEXT NULL, "total_tokens" INTEGER NULL CHECK("total_tokens" >= 0), "is_streaming" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_streaming" IN (0, 1)), "reasoning_text" TEXT NULL, "reasoning_start_at" INTEGER NULL, "reasoning_finished_at" INTEGER NULL, "translation" TEXT NULL, "reasoning_segments_json" TEXT NULL, "group_id" TEXT NULL, "version" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK("version" >= 0), "prompt_tokens" INTEGER NULL CHECK("prompt_tokens" >= 0), "completion_tokens" INTEGER NULL CHECK("completion_tokens" >= 0), "cached_tokens" INTEGER NULL CHECK("cached_tokens" >= 0), "duration_ms" INTEGER NULL CHECK("duration_ms" >= 0), "message_order" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("message_order" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "message_order"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "group_id", "version"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "conversation_mcp_server_rows" ("conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "server_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "ordinal" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("ordinal" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id", "server_id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "ordinal"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "tool_event_rows" ("message_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES message_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "events_json" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "gemini_thought_signature_rows" ("message_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES message_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "signature" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "chat_storage_meta_rows" ("key" TEXT NOT NULL, "value" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("key"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "message_slot_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "role" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("role" IN ('user', 'assistant', 'system', 'tool')), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "message_revision_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "slot_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "parent_revision_id" TEXT NULL, "revision_no" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("revision_no" >= 0), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "finalized_at" INTEGER NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "slot_id", "revision_no"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, slot_id) REFERENCES message_slot_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, parent_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, CHECK (parent_revision_id IS NULL OR parent_revision_id <> id), CHECK (updated_at >= created_at), CHECK (finalized_at IS NULL OR finalized_at >= created_at), CHECK (deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "conversation_branch_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "parent_branch_id" TEXT NULL, "forked_from_revision_id" TEXT NULL, "leaf_revision_id" TEXT NULL, "causality_kind" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("causality_kind" IN ('native', 'legacy_visible_projection', 'legacy_ambiguous')), "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "deleted_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "id"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, parent_branch_id) REFERENCES conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, forked_from_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, leaf_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, CHECK (parent_branch_id IS NULL OR parent_branch_id <> id), CHECK (deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "conversation_state_rows" ("conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "active_branch_id" TEXT NULL, "context_start_revision_id" TEXT NULL, "state_revision" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK("state_revision" >= 0), PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, active_branch_id) REFERENCES conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, context_start_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "message_part_rows" ("conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "revision_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "ordinal" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK("ordinal" >= 0), "kind" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("kind" IN ('text', 'reasoning', 'tool_call', 'tool_result')), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id", "ordinal"), UNIQUE ("conversation_id", "revision_id", "ordinal"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, CHECK (updated_at >= created_at));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "provider_artifact_rows" ("conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "revision_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("kind" IS NOT ''), "payload" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id", "kind"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, CHECK (updated_at >= created_at));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "migration_run_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "source_kind" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("source_kind" IN ('hive', 'sqlite_v1', 'legacy_json')), "source_hash" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("status" IN ('building', 'completed', 'failed')), "started_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "completed_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), UNIQUE ("source_kind", "source_hash"), CHECK (completed_at IS NULL OR completed_at >= started_at));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "migration_issue_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "migration_run_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES migration_run_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "conversation_id" TEXT NULL, "source_entity_id" TEXT NULL, "kind" TEXT NOT NULL, "severity" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("severity" IN ('warning', 'recovered', 'rejected')), "details_json" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "generation_run_rows" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "conversation_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversation_rows (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, "target_revision_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL CHECK("state" IN ('preparing', 'requesting', 'streaming', 'waiting_tool', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted')), "state_revision" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK("state_revision" >= 0), "checkpoint_seq" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK("checkpoint_seq" >= 0), "error_code" TEXT NULL, "created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "terminal_at" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"), FOREIGN KEY (conversation_id, target_revision_id) REFERENCES message_revision_rows (conversation_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, CHECK (updated_at >= created_at), CHECK (terminal_at IS NULL OR terminal_at >= created_at), CHECK ((state IN ('preparing', 'requesting', 'streaming', 'waiting_tool') AND terminal_at IS NULL) OR (state IN ('completed', 'failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted') AND terminal_at IS NOT NULL)), CHECK (error_code IS NULL OR (length(error_code) BETWEEN 1 AND 128 AND state IN ('failed', 'cancelled', 'interrupted'))));
CREATE INDEX idx_conversations_updated_at ON conversation_rows (updated_at DESC, id ASC)
CREATE INDEX idx_conversations_assistant ON conversation_rows (assistant_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_conversation_order ON message_rows (conversation_id, message_order, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_conversation_timestamp ON message_rows (conversation_id, timestamp, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_group ON message_rows (conversation_id, group_id, version, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_message_slots_conversation_created ON message_slot_rows (conversation_id, created_at, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_message_revisions_parent ON message_revision_rows (conversation_id, parent_revision_id, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_message_revisions_slot_version ON message_revision_rows (conversation_id, slot_id, revision_no DESC, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_conversation_branches_leaf ON conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, leaf_revision_id, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_conversation_branches_parent ON conversation_branch_rows (conversation_id, parent_branch_id, id)
CREATE INDEX idx_message_parts_revision_ordinal ON message_part_rows (conversation_id, revision_id, ordinal)
CREATE INDEX idx_provider_artifacts_revision_kind ON provider_artifact_rows (conversation_id, revision_id, kind)
CREATE INDEX idx_migration_issues_run_kind ON migration_issue_rows (migration_run_id, kind, id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_generation_runs_active_target ON generation_run_rows (conversation_id, target_revision_id) WHERE state IN ('preparing', 'requesting', 'streaming', 'waiting_tool')
CREATE INDEX idx_generation_runs_state_updated ON generation_run_rows (state, updated_at, id)
